channel.title: ReactJS on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer
channel.description: Recent content in ReactJS on Shubham | Full Stack & AI Engineer

item.title: Sales Intelligence
item.description:
• 6sense acquired a company named Slintel. Slintel and legacy 6sense Sales Intelligence were merged to form new Sales Intelligence app I was part of 3 member architect team responsible for taking technology decisions which included creating boilerplate to connect with our backend, switch to typescript from javascript, using craco framework, porting reusable front components from legacy app.
  • The ideation started with the problem statement of merging the two apps. We started thinking of just adding one app’s Frontend as an iframe in the other app, but instead we ended up with a total UI overhaul, complete new design language and major changes in architecture.
  • This was a big project which took 5 months and 15 engineers and a lot of late nights.
  • The app was a huge success bringing in 20 million+ revenue

item.title: Sales Dashboards
item.description:
OrangeSomething shut down its operations soon after Covid lockdowns. My journey with 6sense started soon thereafter.

My first project was to create a new app named Sales Dashboards from Scratch. I led the frontend development of this app.

  • I was sole Frontend developer responsible for creating the Frontend architecture, setting up boilerplate code, setting up the CI/CD pipeline, and creating the initial set of reusable components. Two other developers joined later to help with the development.
  • The architecture we chose was Javascript + React + GraphQL + Apollo. The backend was built with Django
  • Developing this app was a great experience where we spent 3 months in hackathon mode and were pushing patches till the last minute.
  • The app went live in November 2020, and I was responsible for the maintaining and supporting the Frontend for the next 4.5 years till it was shut down in March 2025. RIP 🪦
  • The app was a starting point for the sales team to get insights and recommendations for their accounts. It was a single page app with multiple tabs.

item.title: Orangesomething
item.description:
OrangeSomething.com was D2C platform for affordable Beauty and Personal Care products, incubated by Blinkit.

  • I was the lead Developer, responsible for planning and implementing all technical developments.
  • Migrated the platform’s frontend from Shopify to a ReactJS Single-Page Application (SPA), reducing average load time from 12 seconds to 2-3 seconds, significantly improving user experience.
  • Designed and developed an Android app for the platform, resulting in improved customer retention, higher average order value (AOV), and increased conversion rates.
  • Technologies Used: ReactJS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Kotlin

item.title: Transformnow
item.description:
TransformNow is a platform dedicated to promoting healthy eating by offering personalized diet plans, ingredient recommendations, and more.

Key Contributions & Achievements:

  • Designed and developed a Progressive Web App (PWA) from scratch, enabling users to seamlessly plan and manage healthy diets.
  • Delivered a comprehensive application with over 30+ interactive pages, optimized for performance and scalability.
  • Achieved 90+ Lighthouse scores for performance, accessibility, and SEO, ensuring a fast and user-friendly experience.
  • Technologies Used: ReactJS, JavaScript, HTML, CSS

item.title: Apeunit: Frontend Developer
item.description:
Ape Unit is a global network of designers, developers, known for its innovative and exploratory mindset, the company focuses on blockchain, decentralization, climate change projects.

Role Highlights:

  • Led the development of Blockchain Explorer, a sophisticated web app enabling users to delve into the Aeternity Blockchain, exploring transactions, mined blocks, and more.
  • Live Links: Blockchain Explorer | GitHub Repository
  • Established and led a tech team of four developers in India, overseeing the complete product development lifecycle.
  • Employed Agile practices to optimize collaboration and ensure timely delivery of milestones.

Technologies Used: Vue.js, React.js, SCSS, HTML

item.title: Faculty360
item.description:
Faculty360 is a platform designed to streamline the process of faculty recruitment and management for educational institutions.

Faculty360 (web archive)

item.title: Transcend Labs
item.description:
• Worked on implementing an inventory management solution for online marketplaces, for a business. The work involved writing scripts using APIs to automate tasks
  • Developed a web app named Repricer which notified the user via SMS if an item was available in a given price/ condition range on any online marketplaces (eBay, Amazon, Discogs).
  • Technologies Used: Python, Flask, ReactJS, MySQL HTML, CSS
